title: Bootiful - Cloud Boots and more!
description: Treat your feet with these lovingly crafted custom boots. Every item confers different powers. Simply bootiful!
body:
**Bootiful** 👢✨
================

_Treat your feet with these lovingly crafted custom boots. Every item confers different powers. Simply bootiful!_

* * *

In a world where your feet deserve only the finest, **Bootiful** introduces a collection of custom boots, each imbued with unique and powerful abilities. Whether you're looking to leap higher, move faster, or stand your ground, these boots are here to make every step you take truly magical.

* * *

### **Current Boots Included:**

 

![Cloud Boots](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/944/865/cloudboots.png)

undefined

### **Cloud Boots ☁️**

*   **Leap Like the Wind**: Jump up to 3 blocks high, soaring above obstacles with ease.
*   **Soft Landings**: Enjoy decreased fall damage and land softly from any height.
*   **Swift Strides**: Move a bit faster, like you're walking on air.
*   **Balanced**: When taking fall damage, the condition of your Cloud Boots suffers a little. Also, protection is not quite diamond-level. Be careful!

* * *

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/944/867/spikeboots.png)

undefined

### **Spike Boots 🦔**

*   **Technological Marvel**: These boots come equipped with retractable spikes that you can activate by sneaking.
*   **Deadly Defense**: Activate the spikes to damage and slow down any mob you jump on.
*   **Grounded Stability**: While the spikes are deployed, you are anchored into the ground, completely negating knockback.
*   **No More Slipping**: Walk with confidence on slippery blocks; no more icy escapades.

* * *

### **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/944/866/forestboots.png)**

 

### **Forest Boots 🌲**

*   **One with nature:** This footwear grants you special nature powers through the fairy dust that you can rarely find in dark oak leaves.
*   **Resourceful scavenger**: Appreciate the bounty of nature, increasing loot like apples or crops wherever you are.
*   **The healthy forest air**: Fear no wood critters, as being in nature has a chance to heal you a bit
*   **Spring in your step**: The relaxing and idyllic forest causes you to walk faster. 

* * *

**What's Next?**
----------------

This is just the beginning! More boots with unique abilities are planned for future updates. Keep an eye out for new additions that will make your adventures even more **bootiful**! If you've got a splendid idea about which boots your feet would like, feel free to leave a comment!

* * *

Download now and discover how these boots will change the way you traverse your world!
